name: Mastech Digital, Inc.
description: Mastech Digital, Inc. provides digital transformation IT services to businesses in the United States. The company offers data management and analytics services, including data engineering, data science, business intelligence, and data modernization. It also provides digital learning solutions, digital transformation services, and IT staffing services for digital technologies, such as cloud, mobility, social, and analytics, as well as mainstream technologies. Mastech Digital, Inc. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.
